name: Boston Brown Bread
recipeInstructions: Combine first six ingredients; set aside. In a large bowl, mix eggs, egg yolks, molasses, sugar, and oil. Gradually add flour mixture and buttermilk, beating until well combined. Spoon batter into two greased and floured 1-pound coffee cans. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 45 to 50 minutes. Remove from cans and cool on wire racks. Yield: 2 loaves.
